title: CenterPntOffsetX Property
description: Sets or returns the X offset of the center of the search window after it is positioned with the CenterPointObject.
notes:
The CenterPntOffsetX property can be used to shift a search window that has been positioned by a CenterPointObject.

If CenterPointObject property is set to "None", then CenterPntOffsetX has no effect.

See Also: CenterPntOffsetX Property
